_publications._publicationTitle: Using Durometers to Quantify Stiffness as an Outcome Measure for Cutaneous Neurofibroma in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: The Bland–Altman plot for the 3 REX measurements, with all pairwise comparisons, is shown in Figure 3 b, where the mean difference between the 2 measurements was also close to zero, and 94.5% of the points fell within the LOAs
details: 94.5% of repeated measurements fell within limits of agreement on Bland-Altman analysis
